title: I would like to see a more robust Google Calendar Integration.
excerpt: I am looking to streamline my team’s process for events. We use both Monday and Google Calendar within my company to mark events and share information. I wish that the Google calendar integration was more than just one l…

posts.author: Charlsie (Charlsie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to streamline my team’s process for events. We use both Monday and Google Calendar within my company to mark events and share information. I wish that the Google calendar integration was more than just one linking to the other. I’m currently most interested in Monday → Google Calendar integration and would like to see items such as attached files and notes from Monday columns be added to the calendar item. In a perfect world, I’d like to be able to transfer all of the information (including color distinction) that shows up in the Monday Calendar view to the Google one for those outside of our organization or team that do not use Monday
